title: USEC_CLOSE
text: USEC_CLOSE Driver is responsible for releasing any resources it acquired. Use Client/server and SMTP security drivers Expected Input Properties , Parameters InBuf , InDataLen , InBufLen OutBuf , OutDataLen , OutBufLen ErrMsg , ErrMsgLen DrvArea Return Values USEC_SUCCESS Description This function is called after the connection is closed or if errors have occurred. The driver is no longer required and should de-allocate any resources that have been used. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
